sizing_rule.note: Position Size = f × (Account Size / Largest Historical Loss). Half-f multiplier = 88.28796546× starting stake; Full f = 361.093016× starting stake. Use fractional f (half-f recommended) to reduce variance and balance risk-adjusted returns with time horizon.

source_rule_text: Position size should be adjusted as a fraction of optimal f, with half-f providing a multiple of 88.29x starting stake and full f providing 361.09x, to balance risk-adjusted returns with time to reach financial goals
